buildCmd: pnpm -F @karasu-tools/app exec vite build && cp packages/app/dist/assets/index-*.css packages/app/dist/ds-theme.css

dtsPropsFor.Button: /** Tier-1 (actionable) or tier-2 (ghost) toolbar button. Caller supplies an icon + text label. */ variant?: "actionable" | "ghost"; size?: "sm" | "md"; disabled?: boolean; type?: "button" | "submit" | "reset"; "aria-pressed"?: boolean; onClick?: React.MouseEventHandler<HTMLButtonElement>; className?: string; children?: React.ReactNode;
dtsPropsFor.Dialog: /** Radix Dialog root. Compose with DialogContent / DialogHeader / DialogTitle / DialogDescription / DialogFooter. */ open?: boolean; defaultOpen?: boolean; onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void; modal?: boolean; children?: React.ReactNode;
dtsPropsFor.Tabs: /** Radix Tabs root. Compose with TabsList / TabsTrigger. */ value?: string; defaultValue?: string; onValueChange?: (value: string) => void; orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical"; className?: string; children?: React.ReactNode;
dtsPropsFor.DropdownMenu: /** Radix DropdownMenu root. Compose with DropdownMenuTrigger / DropdownMenuContent / DropdownMenuItem / DropdownMenuSeparator. */ open?: boolean; defaultOpen?: boolean; onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void; modal?: boolean; children?: React.ReactNode;
dtsPropsFor.Breadcrumb: /** Breadcrumb nav wrapper. Compose with BreadcrumbList / BreadcrumbItem / BreadcrumbLink / BreadcrumbPage / BreadcrumbSeparator. */ className?: string; children?: React.ReactNode;
dtsPropsFor.EditPaneToolbar: /** Toolbar above the editor: Format / Tidy style actions. */ activeTab: "editor" | "chat" | "settings"; onFormat?: () => void; onTidyStyle?: () => void; hasParseErrors?: boolean;
dtsPropsFor.DiagramTabBar: /** Switches the preview between diagram views; deploy view adds a block selector. */ active: "system" | "deploy" | "org" | "matrix"; onChange: (view: "system" | "deploy" | "org" | "matrix") => void; deployBlocks?: { id: string; label: string }[]; selectedDeployBlockId?: string | null; onDeployBlockChange?: (id: string) => void;
dtsPropsFor.BreadcrumbBar: /** Drill-down breadcrumb for the active diagram view. */ items: { id: string; label: string }[]; onNavigate: (path: string[]) => void;
dtsPropsFor.ErrorBanner: /** Dismissible error banner (localized via LocaleProvider). */ message: string; onDismiss: () => void;
dtsPropsFor.OutlineView: /** Tree outline of the active view's nodes, with icons per node kind. */ nodes: { id: string; label?: string; kind: string; tags?: string[]; children: unknown[] }[]; highlightedNodeId: string | null; onSelectNode: (nodeId: string) => void; onActivateNode: (nodeId: string, ancestorIds: string[]) => void;
dtsPropsFor.FileTree: /** File sidebar backed by a FileSystemProvider. */ rootPath: string; fs: { readFile(path: string): Promise<string>; writeFile(path: string, content: string): Promise<void>; readDir(path: string): Promise<{ name: string; kind: "file" | "directory" }[]>; exists(path: string): Promise<boolean>; delete(path: string): Promise<void>; mkdir(path: string): Promise<void> }; currentFilePath: string | null; onSelectFile: (path: string) => void; onFileCreated?: (path: string) => void; onFileDeleted?: (path: string) => void; onFileRenamed?: (oldPath: string, newPath: string) => void; onCompareWithCurrent?: (path: string) => void; onSnapshotNow?: (path: string) => void; onCompareWithSnapshot?: (path: string) => void; onCompareWithPaste?: () => void;
